summary: Socket.io chat system refactored to production-ready standards with JWT authentication, room-based communication, service layer, and analytics.

new_files.purpose: JWT verification and active user management

changes: Added 4 new indexes for analytics queries
Removed all socket logic (moved to socket.js)
Added ownership validation (delete only by sender, read only by receiver)
Added JWT Authorization header to all requests

authentication.description: JWT token verification on socket connection
authentication.scope: All socket events require valid JWT

authorization.description: Role-based access control and ownership validation

rules.read_message: Only receiver can mark as read
rules.access_chat: Only sender or receiver can access
rules.unread_count: User can only check own count

room_based_communication.description: Messages only sent to specific room, not broadcast

send_message.scope: Only sent to chat room members
send_message.response: receive-message event to room + message-sent acknowledgment

typing.scope: Only sent to other user in room (not to self)

stop_typing.scope: Only sent to other user in room

customer_providers_count.description: Count unique providers a customer has chatted with

provider_customers_count.description: Count unique customers a provider has chatted with

indexes: { receiverId: 1, read: 1 } - Fast unread count query
{ chatId: 1, read: 1 } - Fast read status queries

new_fields.readAt: ISO timestamp when message was read
new_fields.deliveredAt: ISO timestamp when message was delivered

migration_guide.step3: Existing socket clients need to send JWT token in auth header
migration_guide.step4: Existing REST API clients need to add Authorization header
migration_guide.step5: All REST API endpoints now require JWT authentication

socket_connection_example.authentication: Token is verified by socketManager.verifyToken() in socket.js

no_breaking_changes.description: All existing APIs remain functional with added security
no_breaking_changes.note: Only addition is requirement for JWT token in all requests
